cases.input: Point my apex domain example.com at my host using a CNAME, and add the www subdomain too.
Set up active/passive DNS failover for my API with the fastest recovery I can reasonably get.
My HTTPS shows a certificate error in some browsers and the cert expires soon. Fix the renewal.
Design disaster recovery for a tier-1 payments API with 15 minute RTO and 5 minute RPO.
Build me a DR plan for our internal reporting tool. Nobody has told me the downtime or data-loss limits yet.
On a new Firestore order document, send a notification, update a search index, and write an audit record.
Deploy my Node.js Express app to Hostinger with zero-downtime restarts and a rollback path.
Push my Vite static build to Hostinger shared hosting without users ever seeing a half-copied site.
Configure CDN caching for my marketing site so assets stay cached long but I can purge a page on publish.
Migrate my site to a new host: move the domain, switch DNS, and reissue the SSL cert in one go.
Transfer example.org to a new registrar and make sure renewal never lapses again.
Set a backup schedule for our customer database with a 1-hour data-loss tolerance.
